OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: CreateRelatedRecordsForConfigureContract

childElements.name: DMPCreatePNCAndUpdateCaseRecordsForCAR
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "PNCRecords" : "=%DMTPNCRecordsExtraction%", "ClientContractRecordTypeId" : "=%ClientContractRecordTypeId%", "ContractStartDate" : "=%ContractStartDate%", "ContractEndDate" : "=%ContractEndDate%", "AgreementCategory" : "=%AgreementCategory%", "ContractName" : "=%ContractName%", "ProformaModelId" : "=%ProformaModelId%", "OpportunityId" : "=%OpportunityId%", "OpportunityAccountId" : "=%OpportunityAccountId%", "OpportunityOwnerId" : "=%OpportunityOwnerId%", "caseCreatedDate" : "=%caseCreatedDate%", "ContextId" : "=%ContextId%", "PNCEndDate" : "==IF(ISBLANK(%ContractEndDate%),'2099-01-01',%ContractEndDate%)" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DMPCreatePNCAndUpdateCaseRecordsForCAR", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }
